docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $493.42 FILED BY DRAPIER A CA CORP DBA WINE DISTRIBUTORS AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBAL RESTAURANT, INC. DBA TRUDY'S ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBAL RESTAURANT, INC. DBA TRUDY'S

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DRAPIER A CA CORP DBA WINE DISTRIBUTORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLOBAL RESTAURANT, INC. DBA TRUDY'S $493.42 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $553.42 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO GLOBAL REST. RETURNED, NOT KNOWN.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $5.91 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBAL RESTAURANT, INC. DBA TRUDY'S
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBAL RESTAURANT, INC. DBA TRUDY'S
